fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> is a ref struct that collects configuration for creating a typeface via <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)" />. It supports specifying a font collection index, a palette index, palette color overrides, and variation design coordinates.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    PaletteIndex = 1
};
using var typeface = originalTypeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies arguments for constructing or cloning a typeface with specific variation, palette, and collection settings.

fields.value: The index of the desired font within a TTC or other font collection.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the font within a font collection.

fields.value: The index of the desired color palette.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values that override specific palette entries.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the palette color overrides to apply.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying axis positions.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position coordinates.
